hooks.statusMessage: 刷新 README 学习进度

hooks.command: try { & node scripts/render-views.mjs .learn/topics; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Warning "视图报告刷新失败，继续会话收尾" } } catch { Write-Warning "视图报告刷新异常，继续会话收尾：$($_.Exception.Message)" }; git add -A; if (git status --porcelain) { git commit -q -m "chore: 会话结束自动提交 $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')" }; git push -q
hooks.statusMessage: 会话结束：刷新视图、提交并推送
